conservative.name: The Gates of Sleep
conservative.requirements: 7 favour. Engaged with target, who must be a living creature

success.description: You touch the target's eyelids and he is overcome with sleep, immediately lying down to snore peacefully. He remains asleep until you permit him to awaken, he suffers any damage or wounds, or the sun comes up, whichever comes first

chaosStar.description: You fall asleep as well and remain asleep for as long as well and remain asleep for as long as the target does. Your dreams are mingled with t he target's, a disturbing and possibly enlightening experience.
